nodes.label: MIDI In
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI events (notes, CC, pitch bend, aftertouch, etc.)

nodes.label: Event Type?
nodes.description: Base class dispatches by HiseEvent::Type to the appropriate callback

nodes.label: Note-On Gate
nodes.description: Blocks note-on if ignore=true. Always updates noteOns bitmask.

nodes.label: Note-Off Gate
nodes.description: Blocks note-off if ignore=true, unless fix=true AND note was previously heard. Always clears noteOns bit.

nodes.label: Note Tracker (BigInteger)
nodes.description: 128-bit bitmask tracking which note numbers have been heard (set on noteOn, cleared on noteOff)

nodes.label: Non-Note Passthrough
nodes.description: CC, pitch bend, aftertouch, program change, and all other non-note events pass through unmodified

nodes.label: ignoreButton
nodes.description: Toggle: when on, note-on events are blocked

nodes.label: fixStuckNotes
nodes.description: Toggle: when on, allows note-offs for previously-heard notes during muted state

nodes.label: MIDI Out
nodes.description: Filtered MIDI events (blocked events are marked as ignored)
